info.title: hxreport
info.description: The .NET CLI tool to generate customisable human-friendly reports from technical test results.

options.name: --input
options.description: Input files to generate reports from

options.name: --output
options.description: Path of the output file to store the generated merged report in (see the --merge option) or path of the folder to store multiple generated reports

options.name: --merge
options.description: Determines whether the input files should be merged into a single output report, or every input file should have a separate generated output report

options.name: --style
options.description: The key=value pairs to specify custom styling, i.e. colors, for the output reports

options.name: --content
options.description: The key=value pairs to specify custom content replacements, i.e. header or footer, in the output reports

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Sets the verbosity level for logging [default: Information]
